response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive Java, OOP, and software development expertise far exceeding the role's requirements, he is critically mismatched for this position. His German language skills are listed as 'Basic'—insufficient for the explicitly required 'strong verbal and written communication in German' with insurance clients. More importantly, his 15+ years as a Senior/Staff engineer creates severe retention risk for an entry-level position; he will likely become bored and leave within months. The unexplained 7-month career gap further suggests this role does not align with his actual career trajectory or compensation expectations.
strengths: Deep expertise in Java, OOP, and software architecture across multiple languages and platforms
Computer Science degree with 15+ years of proven software development experience
Demonstrated agile proficiency (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and cloud technology exposure (AWS CDK)
concerns: German language proficiency is 'Basic'—role requires 'strong verbal and written communication in German' as explicit requirement
Massively overqualified (Staff/Senior level) for entry-level position—high attrition risk once role becomes unstimulating
Unexplained 7-month career gap (Oct 2025–present) raises questions about motivation, circumstances, and fit for junior-level work
